title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Walmart India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Walmart India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Walmart India Holdings Services in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Walmart India Holdings Services:
Walmart India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walmart India Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
